options.name: Wretched (Choleric)
options.description: Made from brutal flesh — aggressive, rageful, given to violence.

options.name: Osiran (Melancholic)
options.description: Made from preserved death — contemplative, patient, scholarly.

options.name: Ulgan (Phlegmatic)
options.description: Made from spirit-touched flesh — shamanic, liminal, between worlds.

options.name: Galatea (Sanguine)
options.description: Made from beauty — graceful, charming, tragically human.
options.hint: Affinity Transmutations: Alchemicus, Deception, Mesmerism, Vulcanus

options.name: Tammuz (Supernal)
options.description: Made from clay and divine breath — solid, enduring, purposeful.
options.hint: Affinity Transmutations: Corporeum, Disquietism, Electrification, Vitality

options.name: Aurum
options.description: Gold — pursuing humanity through social connection.

options.name: Cuprum
options.description: Copper — pursuing humanity through emotional experience.

options.name: Ferrum
options.description: Iron — discipline, endurance, and physical mastery.

options.name: Plumbum
options.description: Lead — studying Promethean nature and the Azothic memory.

options.name: Stannum
options.description: Tin — accepting pain and imperfection as teachers.

powers.label: Transmutations
powers.description: Distribute 3 dots among Transmutations. One dot must go to an affinity Transmutation (based on your Lineage).

items.name: Alchemicus
items.description: Manipulation of base elements, chemical processes, and the essence of matter.

powers.name: Identification
powers.description: By scrutinizing an object, the Promethean discerns all its material components through extended roll.

powers.name: Fortification
powers.description: Infuse Pyros into a touched object, increasing its Durability by 1 per Pyros spent (maximum 3, ceiling 6).

powers.name: Transformation
powers.description: Touching an object allows the Promethean to change it from one substance to another for the scene.

powers.name: Alteration
powers.description: Channel Pyros into a touched object to make it malleable, reshaping it into a new form through extended roll.

powers.name: Spark of Life
powers.description: Infuse a corpse dead less than 24 hours with Pyros, animating it as a pseudo-Promethean that obeys commands for the scene.

items.name: Corporeum
items.description: Mastery and reshaping of the physical body, from basic control to extraordinary transformation.

powers.name: Autonomic Control
powers.description: Gain conscious control of the autonomic nervous system; automatically ignore pain, fatigue, hunger, and extreme temperatures.

powers.name: Regeneration
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros (reflexive) to heal one bashing or lethal wound; spend 2 Pyros to heal one aggravated wound.

powers.name: Human Flesh
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros to appear fully human for the scene, hiding all disfigurements even from close medical scrutiny.

powers.name: Perfected Reflexes
powers.description: Reflexively spend 1 Pyros to increase Defense by 4 for the turn, including against ranged attacks.

powers.name: Hard Body
powers.description: Roll Azoth + Medicine; each success grants 1 point of armor not capped by Stamina for the scene.

items.name: Deception
items.description: Illusion, concealment, and alteration of the Promethean's apparent nature and physical form.

powers.name: Color of Man
powers.description: Roll Manipulation + Subterfuge to alter skin, hair, and eye color to any human shade; lasts up to 24 hours on exceptional success.

powers.name: Leave No Trace
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; for the scene the Promethean leaves no footprints, fingerprints, hair, or body oils — physical tracking automatically fails.

powers.name: Body Double
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros to alter general physique, Size (±1), or one Physical Attribute by one dot for the scene.

powers.name: Mask
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; roll Wits + Subterfuge to physically alter facial structure and hair, disguising as a specific other person for the scene.

powers.name: Vitreous Humour
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; the Promethean's body becomes completely transparent for the scene, allowing Stealth actions in plain sight.

items.name: Disquietism
items.description: Mastery over the Promethean's disquieting aura — weaponizing, redirecting, or suppressing its effects.

powers.name: Scapegoat
powers.description: Contested roll Manipulation + Subterfuge vs. Composure + Azoth; on success, transfer the Promethean's Disquiet onto a touched target for the scene.

powers.name: Tension in the Air
powers.description: Roll Presence + Persuasion vs. targets' Composure; affected targets become anxious and paranoid, granting Intimidation bonuses.

powers.name: Iago's Whisper
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; contested roll Manipulation + Intimidation vs. Resolve + Azoth; a touched target is compelled to hunt and kill a named individual.

powers.name: Nameless Dread
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; the Disquiet aura flares to full intensity on one target, paralyzing them with terror and imposing –1 per success to all their rolls.

powers.name: Quell Disquiet
powers.description: Spend 1–2 Pyros; reflexively suppress all Disquiet effects for the scene; can be around a number of mortals equal to Presence or Manipulation.

items.name: Electrification
items.description: Command of electrical forces — from sensing and powering devices to hurling lightning.

powers.name: Jolt
powers.description: Power any electrical device by touch for the scene; spend 2 Pyros to power a remotely connected device.

powers.name: Shock
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; roll Azoth + Stamina; inflict 1 bashing damage per success via electrocution through touch.

powers.name: Arc
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; roll Azoth + Stamina; fire an electrical bolt at range (20 yards per Dexterity dot) inflicting bashing damage, bypassing most armor.

powers.name: Blackout
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; create an EMP that destroys all electrical devices within a radius of 1 yard doubled per Azoth dot beyond the first.

powers.name: Divine Lightning
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; Shock or Arc now inflicts lethal damage; Arc range extends to 20 yards per (Dexterity + Azoth) dot.

items.name: Mesmerism
items.description: Supernatural influence over minds, memories, and the perceptions of others.

powers.name: Fixed Stare
powers.description: Contested roll Presence + Intimidation vs. Resolve + Azoth; eye contact paralyzes the target's will indefinitely as long as the Promethean maintains the gaze.

powers.name: Suggestion
powers.description: Contested roll Manipulation + Persuasion vs. Composure + Azoth; whisper a one-sentence command the target obeys within one day per Azoth dot, then forgets receiving.

powers.name: In Vino Veritas
powers.description: Extended contested roll Manipulation + Subterfuge vs. Composure + Azoth; target becomes compelled to answer questions truthfully — one question per success.

powers.name: Waters of Lethe
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; contested extended roll to erase or rewrite a specific memory in the target; effects erode naturally over time.

powers.name: Pygmalion's Caress
powers.description: Spend 2 Pyros; contested extended roll; cause a target to assume a false identity of the Promethean's invention, genuinely believing they are that person.

items.name: Metamorphosis
items.description: Radical reshaping of the Promethean's body into other forms — animal, object, or monstrous.

powers.name: Natural Weaponry
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros to grow claws or fangs dealing lethal damage with a +1 die modifier; lasts one scene.

powers.name: Redundant Organ
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; shapeshift a body part into an additional organ, conferring that organ's mechanical advantages for the scene.

powers.name: Shape of the Barghest
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros to assume a large mastiff-like form with +1 Strength, +3 Speed, lethal claws, and free activation of any one-dot Sensorium powers.

powers.name: Guise of Proteus
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; extended roll (5+ successes); transform into any solid inanimate object within Size ±2 of yourself for the scene.

powers.name: Chimera
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; extended roll (5+ successes); perfectly assume the form of any animal or creature you have previously touched, retaining Mental Attributes.

items.name: Sensorium
items.description: Heightening and expanding the senses far beyond human limits, including perception of the supernatural.

powers.name: Bloodhound's Nose
powers.description: Roll Wits + Survival to gain superior olfactory sense; track by scent alone and add two bonus dice to smell-based perception rolls for 24 hours.

powers.name: Aura Sight
powers.description: Roll Intelligence + Empathy vs. subject's Composure; perceive psychic auras revealing emotional states and supernatural nature.

powers.name: Ephemeral Gaze
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; for the scene, perceive spiritual objects and creatures existing in Twilight alongside the physical world.

powers.name: Rarefied Senses
powers.description: All of the Promethean's perception rolls become rote actions (re-roll any failed die once) for the scene.

powers.name: Clairvoyant Senses
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; using a physical link, see, hear, smell, and feel the target's surroundings from thousands of miles away for the scene.

items.name: Vitality
items.description: The generative force of raw strength and physical might, mastered to devastating effect.

powers.name: Might
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; adds +1 to Strength for the scene. Each additional dot of Might purchased adds another +1 (up to +5 at five dots).

powers.name: Bludgeon
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; on any Brawl or Weaponry attack against a living target, the victim loses their next action if even one point of damage is inflicted.

powers.name: Striking the Gates of Tartarus
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; roll Strength + Athletics to strike the ground and knock down everyone within Azoth yards who fails Dexterity + Athletics.

powers.name: Stupefying Blow
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; reflexive; if a Brawl attack inflicts any damage, target must roll Stamina + Athletics or be knocked unconscious for one turn.

powers.name: Pulverizing Blow
powers.description: Permanent; whenever any Might Transmutation is active and the Promethean enters hand-to-hand combat, all unarmed blows inflict lethal damage.

items.name: Vulcanus
items.description: Direct mastery of Pyros — sensing, sharing, stealing, and unleashing the divine fire.

powers.name: Sense Pyros
powers.description: Roll Wits + Azoth to sense the presence and location of Pyros or Azoth within 200 yards; detects active Transmutations and Bestowments.

powers.name: Share Pyros
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros per point transferred; by touch, transfer Pyros to another Promethean or Pandoran up to the Azoth limit per turn.

powers.name: Fire Grasp
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; surround one hand with Pyros-fire; a successful touch inflicts 2 lethal damage (aggravated to Prometheans) and can ignite flammable materials.

powers.name: Steal Pyros
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; contested roll Strength + Brawl vs. Resolve + Azoth; on a successful touch, steal 1 Pyros per success from another Promethean or Pandoran.

powers.name: Drain Pyros
powers.description: Spend 1 Pyros; contested roll at range 20 yards (no touch required); functions as Steal Pyros but at distance.
